scenario_bins.goal: Assert/release reset and observe reset-visible state, outputs, and pready/irq contract.
Legal CSR programming, start, copy beat(s), completion status, and IRQ match FunctionalModel.
Apply stalls/delays on APB/memory phases and verify stable payloads, ordering, and latency/backpressure rules.
Inject ERR_START_BUSY, ERR_ZERO_LENGTH, and ERR_BAD_CSR_ADDR; verify status/response/recovery behavior.
Observe required waveform probes, status outputs, and trace events in nominal and error flows.
Drive FM_RESET preconditions and compare exact outputs/side effects.
Drive FM_APB_WRITE preconditions and compare CSR update/clear/error/pslverr behavior.
Drive FM_APB_READ preconditions and compare read mux, pready, and pslverr.
Drive FM_START preconditions and compare latch, busy/error, first read valid/address.
Drive FM_READ_ACCEPT and compare read address/valid behavior.
Drive FM_READ_DATA and compare captured data, write valid/data/address/strobe.
Drive FM_WRITE_ACCEPT and compare pointer advance, next read, completion, done/irq_status/irq.

transaction_bins.goal: Reset clears all architectural state and drives pready=1 irq=0.
CSR writes update idle fields, ignore config while busy, clear done/irq_status, set error on busy start, and report illegal pslverr.
Read CTRL/SRC/DST/LENGTH/STATUS/IRQ_STATUS and illegal offset readback/pslverr.
Start nonzero length latches pointers and asserts first read; zero length sets error without memory traffic.
Read request accepted at current_src with busy-derived mem_rd_valid.
Read data capture produces write beat with current_dst and full/partial byte strobes.
Write accept advances by min(4,remaining), repeats or completes, and sets done/irq_status on final beat.

functional_bins.goal: CTRL.irq_enable write/readback plus CTRL.clear_done clearing done and irq_status.
Program source, destination, and length while idle and read back exact values.
Configuration writes while busy are ignored except start while busy sets STATUS.error.
Observe busy during transfer, done after final write, and sticky error for declared error sources.
IRQ_STATUS.done_irq sticky set on completion; irq equals CTRL.irq_enable && IRQ_STATUS.done_irq until clear_done.
Length >=4 produces full strobe 0xF and writes preceding read data.
Final remaining byte counts 1, 2, and 3 produce strobes 0x1, 0x3, and 0x7.
current_src/current_dst/byte_index advance by 4 on non-final full beats and by remaining bytes on final beat.

cycle_bins.goal: Register access completes in any psel && penable cycle with pready high.
mem_rd_ready low stalls READ_REQ and mem_rd_addr remains stable.
No write request is issued while waiting for mem_rdata_valid.
mem_wr_ready low stalls WRITE_REQ and write address/data/strobe remain stable.
APB start latches programmed fields before first memory request.
Each write beat uses immediately preceding read data beat.
The next read is not issued until current write is accepted.
Done and irq_status update only after final write accepted.
No-stall nonzero transfer observes min_cycles >= 3 from CTRL.start accepted to STATUS.done.
At most one transfer and one memory beat outstanding.

fsm_bins.goal: IDLE to READ_REQ on start accepted with length_bytes != 0.
IDLE to ERROR on zero-length start or start while busy.
READ_REQ to READ_DATA when mem_rd_valid && mem_rd_ready.
WRITE_REQ loops to READ_REQ when !last_beat and goes to COMPLETE on last_beat.
COMPLETE commits status then IDLE; ERROR returns to IDLE on clear_done or reset.

error_bins.goal: Software writes CTRL.start while busy; STATUS.error is set and current transfer continues.
Start with LENGTH_BYTES == 0 sets STATUS.error and starts no memory traffic.
Unsupported APB offset asserts pslverr and leaves architectural state unchanged.
Reset clears error, busy, done, and irq_status.
CTRL.clear_done clears done and irq_status while preserving error.

debug_bins.goal: All listed waveform probes are sampled in nominal and error flows.
transfer_start trace fires on accepted nonzero idle start.
beat_read_accepted trace fires on mem_rd_valid && mem_rd_ready.
beat_write_accepted trace fires on mem_wr_valid && mem_wr_ready.
transfer_complete trace fires on final write accepted.
error_detected trace fires for any declared error source.
STATUS.busy, STATUS.done, STATUS.error, IRQ_STATUS.done_irq, and irq are observed.

security_safety_bins.goal: CSR writes are deterministic and busy-time ignores match SSOT policy.
Writes reflect preceding reads in strict order for exact length_bytes.
Invalid CSR address mitigation is pslverr with no state mutation.
Overlapping start mitigation enforces one-outstanding policy and sticky error.
